global_style: Painterly storybook illustration, warm muted palette, 1950s small-town.

characters.name: The Boy
characters.description: An ~8-year-old boy carrying heavy bags home at night.
characters.appearance_prompt: An 8-year-old boy, slight build, short dark hair, oversized grey coat

scenes.keyframe_prompt: wide establishing shot of an empty small-town street just past midnight, wet cobblestones, a small park to one side, quiet and still
a small boy stands near a dark park path at night, seen from behind, holding a large heavy bag in each hand
following a small boy walking down empty night streets carrying two heavy bags, the narrator's pov behind him
the boy enters an old building doorway as a dim red light rises around the walls, eerie and unnatural
climbing a dim red-lit stairwell of an old building, deep shadows in the corners, the boy a few steps ahead
a third-floor door opens on its own; the small boy turns to face the viewer, his eyes completely black, dread
